inspectorWorkspaceEmptyHint: Drop a video file here or click “Open…”. The current editor preview file is used when you open the Inspector route.
inspectorWorkspaceEmptyRegionAria: Hint when no file is open yet
inspectorWorkspaceFfprobeRefreshTitle: Run ffprobe again for the current file
inspectorWorkspaceMainAria: Inspector workspace: hint, error, and ffprobe summary
inspectorWorkspacePathFooterAria: Full path of the open file
inspectorWorkspaceProbeStackAria: ffprobe results for the current file
